headline: Is Rush Enterprises, Inc. (RUSHA) A Good Stock To Buy Now?

headline: NASCAR Star's secrets to winning off the track
summary: Taking his racing skillset to the local Ford dealer. NASCAR star Joey Logano recently made headlines for purchasing an ownership stake in Huntersville Ford in North Carolina. It’s Logano’s home dealership, and he has wasted no time getting the ins and outs of running a successful dealership. Logano is a multi-time Cup Series champion and one of the sport’s most consistent playoff performers, known for his aggressive driving style, precise race strategy, and ability to deliver in high-pressure championship moments. Logano joined the Opening Bid Unfiltered podcast with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to discuss life off the track, what else he would like to accomplish in the sport, and how driving at 200mph can also be helpful to leading with success

headline: Nissan’s new hybrid is a U.S.-first that mixes EV driving with a gas engine
summary: Nissan plans to introduce a new type of hybrid for the U.S. market that drives like an all-electric vehicle but is powered by a traditional gas-powered engine.
